No Trade
Slot: HEAD
AC: 8
CHA: +15 INT: +10 HP: +30 MANA: +20
SV DISEASE: +2 SV MAGIC: +7
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Dazzling Circlet
No Trade
Slot: HEAD
AC: 8
CHA: +15 INT: +10 HP: +30 MANA: +20
SV DISEASE: +2 SV MAGIC: +7
WT: 0.2 Size: SMALL
Class: ENC
Race: HUM ERU HIE DEF GNM DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Cloth
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Submitted By:Linara d'Estra
Lucy Entry By:kaiytlyn
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-12-18 11:51:55
Page Updated:Mon Oct 24th, 2016

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
Enchanter Kael Armor

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Kael Drakkel


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
#Anonymous, Posted: May 03 2001 at 1:38 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I like the 30 hp, nothing else really worth mentioning about this item tho.
RE: ok
QuoteReply
# Jun 15 2003 at 3:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
Ugh, another person who has become jaded to all of the uber items. I have a Savant's Cap, which is nice (Gives Reagent Conservation II to my knowledge), but THIS is one SWEET cap. I love the AC, saves me occasionally. Oh, not to mention the 15 CHA and 10 INT!!! I give everyone permission that if I ever get to take such good items for granted like this person to beat me into a drunken unconciousness with a celery stick. BTW, I had nothing on my arms slot until level 32, not to mention I still have Fungal Flesh/Membrane Gloves and Pants at 33, and I do okay with 192 INT. I love playing this game, but I get tired of people that ONLY care about getting uber-er loot and higher stats over enhancing the overall gaming experience with quests and making friends. I just hope that for most of you I am preaching to the choir and the people who I am trying to talk to are in the minority.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: May 01 2001 at 7:40 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OK HERES THE DEAL....IS THERE ANY WAY A LVL 25 ENCHANTER CAN GET THIS HIGHER LVL STUFF IF
New Stats Post Patch
QuoteReply
# Mar 11 2001 at 1:27 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757054940
2 posts
Hey guys, my Jpg converter seems to be on the fritz, so I'm posting to update the new stats. I was really disappointed with the initial stats, but the upgrade makes this item very nice and replaces my Tranix crown for day to day gear.

AC 8, Cha +15, Int +10, Hp +30, Mana +20, Sv Disease +2, Sv. Magic +7. No effect.

Linara d'Estra
Keepers of the Faith
www.keepersofthefaith.org
Prexus

▲ Page top
Spelling
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2001 at 11:46 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
But its too bad Verant can't spell Dazzling correctly. Its dazzle not dazzel.

Dazzle, dazzled, dazzling, dazzles. Go back to 4th grade or use a freakin spell checker
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 06 2001 at 7:41 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) people, its fake, there is a dazzLING circlet but those are the real stats, think of it....10 int? give me a break.....then we can go see...oh yes....ITS NOT REAL!
RE: Spelling
QuoteReply
# Apr 29 2001 at 1:41 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Yes, actually the spelling and stats are correct. Get the item before you start saying stupid stuff like that. you know, there are ways to change the background...

Idiot.
▲ Page top
Still worse than Tranix.
QuoteReply
# Mar 05 2001 at 8:02 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Less magic resistance, and more importantly, less AC. At the level where you can get that, I really wouldn't trade AC and resists for int - my int has been maxxed for a very long time.
▲ Page top
RE: Still worse than Tranix.
QuoteReply
# May 31 2002 at 2:01 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592252002361
Scholar
23 posts
Less AC..... BAH with a capitol B! There is no difference between 600 or 700 AC. When fighting the mobs that we get killed by we still get doubled or tripled for their max damage (whether it be 140, 190 or 270). What matters is having a cleric you can trust. PERIOD.

In fact this game is 95% how you play and 5% items. At least for casters it is.
Cbaaoth 59 chanter
▲ Page top
RE: Still worse than Tranix.
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2004 at 1:51 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592263073249
8 posts
As someone who has logged a lot of time on an enchanter, I can assure you that the extra 100 AC makes a big difference when soloing.

Better than the beguilers crown

This has 1 ac better than the beguilers crown that you get from the Thurgadin quest
